rules.description: Invoke ERISA's 'full and fair review' standard to challenge case-blind boilerplate reasoning, failure to engage with submitted clinical evidence, or procedurally unreasonable documentation deadlines (e.g., 48 hours) that leave no realistic opportunity to assemble and submit records.

Under the Mental Health Parity and Addiction Equity Act (MHPAEA), fail-first step-therapy requirements imposed on behavioral health services must have analogous requirements for comparable medical or surgical procedures under the same plan.

Cite that repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation (rTMS) is FDA-cleared and recommended in the American Psychiatric Association major-depression practice guideline specifically for treatment-resistant depression after multiple failed pharmacologic trials.

Cite CDC sexually transmitted infection treatment guidelines and randomized trials endorsing an extended suppressive regimen of twice-weekly intravaginal metronidazole gel for recurrent bacterial vaginosis to prevent relapse.

State that Erenumab (Aimovig) is FDA-approved (2018) for migraine prevention and supported by Category 1 pivotal randomized trials (STRIVE and ARISE) and the 2021 American Headache Society consensus statement.
